title: Readings
content:
Key EA = Elemental Analysis MS = Mass Spectrometry IR = Infrared Spectroscopy NMR = Nuclear Magnetic Resonance
Required Text McMurry, John. Fundamentals of Organic Chemistry. 6th ed. Pacific Grove, CA: Thomson-Brooks/Cole, 2006. ISBN: 9780495012030.
Additional Texts McMurry, Susan. Study Guide and Student Solutions Manual for John McMurry’s Organic Chemistry. 6th ed. Belmont, CA: Thomson-Brooks/Cole, 2003. ISBN: 9780534409340.
Wade, L. G., Jr. Organic Chemistry. 5th ed. Upper Saddle River, NJ: Prentice Hall, 2002. ISBN: 9780130338327.
Clayden, J., et al. Organic Chemistry. Oxford, England: Oxford University Press, 2000. ISBN: 9780198503460.
SES # TOPICS READINGS L1 Molecular Formula and Index of Hydrogen Deficiency [EA] McMurry. Chapter 12, pp. 393-423, and Chapter 13, pp. 424-463. L2 Molecular Formula and Index of Hydrogen Deficiency [MS] L3 Functional Groups [IR] L4 Functional Groups: Fragmentation [MS] L5 Functional Groups [13C NMR] L6 Connectivity [1H NMR] L7 Connectivity [1H NMR] (cont.) L8 Organic Structure Elucidation L9 Organic Structure Elucidation (cont.) Exam 1 L10 Ethers, Epoxides, and Sulfides McMurry. Chapter 18, pp. 639-671. L11 Ethers, Epoxides, and Sulfides (cont.) L12 Conjugated Systems and Molecular Orbital Theory L13 Conjugated Systems and Molecular Orbital Theory (cont.) L14 Pericyclic Reactions - Introduction McMurry. Chapter 14, pp. 464-497.
(Also review McMurry. Chapter 15, pp. 498-527.)
L15 Pericyclic Reactions - Electrocyclic Processes L16 Pericyclic Reactions - Cycloadditions L17 Pericyclic Reactions - Cycloadditions, Sigmatropic Rearrangements L18 Pericyclic Reactions - Sigmatropic Rearrangements Exam 2 L19 Amines Suggested Reading
McMurry. Chapter 24.
L20 Amines (cont.) L21 Carboxylic Acids and Derivatives Suggested Reading
McMurry. Sections 19.2-19.8, 19.11, 20.1-20.9, and 21.1-21.7.
L22 Carboxylic Acids and Derivatives (cont.) L23 Carboxylic Acids and Derivatives (cont.) L24 Carboxylic Acids and Derivatives (cont.) L25 Enols and Enolates Exam 3 L26 Enols and Enolates (cont.) L27 Enols and Enolates (cont.) L28 Enols and Enolates (cont.) L29 Carbocations L30 Carbocations (cont.) L31 Carbocations (cont.) L32 Carbocations (cont.) Exam 4 L33 Radicals L34 Radicals (cont.) L35 Photochemistry
